questions.q: What was the ruling regarding the death of a refugee left at a Buffalo doughnut shop by Border Patrol?
questions.correctText: The death of the refugee was ruled a homicide.

questions.q: According to a recent report, why did Iran state it will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz?
questions.correctText: Iran stated it will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz because of Trump's 'ridiculous displays'.

questions.q: What major international organization is Donald Trump reportedly strongly considering pulling the US out of?
questions.correctText: Donald Trump is reportedly strongly considering pulling the US out of NATO.

questions.q: What message did the Iranian president convey in a recent letter regarding ordinary Americans?
options: Iran harbors no enmity towards them
Iran is open to cultural exchanges
questions.correctText: The Iranian president conveyed in a letter that Iran harbors no enmity towards ordinary Americans.

questions.q: What significant space event did NASA recently launch for the first time in half a century?
questions.correctText: NASA recently launched its first crewed lunar mission in half a century.
